rows.source_ref: "Best Strategy to use" thread, started by user tembophd990, BabyPips forum, 2021-2024, https://forums.babypips.com/t/best-strategy-to-use/514920
rows.concept: Open-ended forum discussion asking which trading strategy is best; replies are generic opinions with no mechanical, testable rule set.
rows.eligibility_reason: No implementable edge — thread is generic advice ('no best strategy', 'practice on demo', 'price action', scalping opinions); no deterministic entry/exit/params anywhere.
rows.notes: Closest to a strategy is post 2 (tommor): trend-follow strongest-vs-weakest currency on daily, enter on pullback recovery, variable SL, 1% risk, pyramid winners, exit before next pullback -- but strength ranking, pullback definition, pyramid and stop rules are all undefined, so VAGUE, not mechanizable. Post 3/11 references an external MT4 Elliott-wave/Fib/S&R/MACD strategy in another thread (discretionary, out of scope). Remainder is pure chatter.
